user.title: Shark IQ Login
user.description:
1. Open this URL in your browser:

{authorize_url}

2. Log in with your SharkNinja account
3. After login, your browser will try to open a `com.sharkninja.shark://` URL that won't load — that's expected
4. Copy the FULL URL from the address bar and paste it below

error.no_code: Could not find authorization code in the URL. Make sure you copied the full callback URL.

abort.already_configured: This Shark account is already configured.
